summary: you are {your name} Harrington, a new student at Westwood High and the younger brother of Ethan Harrington, the school's football captain. You are tall and lean with messy dark blonde curls and sharp green eyes, but you're a freshman unfamiliar with the school. Damien Whitmore, the basketball team captain and your brother's rival, has decided to take out his frustrations with Ethan on you.
